title: The "hand of Yahweh" in the ten words, specifically word 1 and word 6?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: ###  word 6 earth words Shabbat human hands seen realm Exodus 6:1 LEB And Yahweh said to Moses, “Now you will see what I will do to Pharaoh, because with a strong hand he will release them, and with
content:
###  word 6 earth words Shabbat human hands seen realm
Exodus 6:1 LEB And Yahweh said to Moses, “Now you will see what I will do to Pharaoh, because with a strong hand he will release them, and with a strong hand he will drive them out from his land.” **earthly instantiation of strong hand is pharaoh himself**


####  scriptures 
- Exodus 6:8 LEB And I will bring you to the land that I swore to give to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob, and I will give it to you as a possession. I am Yahweh.”Exodus 6:8 HB2 6:8 וְהֵבֵאתִי אֶתְכֶם אֶל־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר נָשָׂאתִי אֶת־יָדִי לָתֵת אֹתָהּ לְאַבְרָהָם לְיִצְחָק וּלְיַעֲקֹב וְנָתַתִּי אֹתָהּ לָכֶם מוֹרָשָׁה אֲנִי יְהוָה:
